text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench: "🇺🇸🇮🇷⚡Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmail Baghaei: Iran’s enriched uranium is as sacred as the country’s soil and will under no circumstances be transferred anywhere." 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Mainstream media should update their news like WSJ.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench：“🇺🇸🇮🇷⚡伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：伊朗的浓缩铀与国家领土一样神圣，在任何情况下都不会转移到任何地方。” 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 主流媒体应该像《华尔街日报》一样更新他们的新闻。

text: WarMonitor Not even getting into the whole “eight wars” claim, but wars he started definitely don’t count. Trump: I ended eight wars, and if we add Iran and Lebanon that will be ten wars ended and many many millions of lives saved https://x.com/disclosetv/status/2045263133044842556/video/1 - Republicans against Trump tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 甚至不去讨论所谓的“八场战争”说法，但他发动的战争肯定不算数。特朗普：我结束了八场战争，如果我们加上伊朗和黎巴嫩，那就是结束了十场战争，挽救了数百万人的生命 https://x.com/disclosetv/status/2045263133044842556/video/1 - 反对特朗普的共和党人推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇱🇧U.S. President Trump promised to make Lebanon great again. "Our deal with Iran is not in any way tied to Lebanon, but we will make Lebanon great again. I mean, it's about time we get some we've we've sort of the world has forgotten them, and they're…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 U.S. President Trump promised to bring about a new dawn for Cuba. "Will also bring about a day, seventy years in waiting. It's called a new dawn for Cuba. We're gonna help them out with Cuba. We have a lot of great Cuban Americans. Not too many people in this audience, I don't think, but you go to Miami. We have people, Cuban Americans, people that were brutally treated, whose families were killed and brutalized. And now watch what happens." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇱🇧美国总统特朗普承诺让黎巴嫩再次伟大。“我们与伊朗的协议与黎巴嫩没有任何关系，但我们将让黎巴嫩再次伟大。我的意思是，是时候让我们……世界已经遗忘了他们，他们……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 美国总统特朗普承诺为古巴带来新的曙光。“也将带来等待了七十年的那一天。这被称为古巴的新曙光。我们将帮助古巴。我们有很多伟大的古巴裔美国人。我想这个听众席里没多少人，但你去迈阿密看看。我们有古巴裔美国人，他们曾受到残酷对待，他们的家人被杀害和虐待。现在看着会发生什么。” @wfwitness

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) The speaker of the Iranian parliament says the Strait of Hormuz won't be open as long as the US blockade continues. ۱- رئیس جمهور آمریکا در یک ساعت هفت ادعا مطرح کرد که هر هفت ادعا کذب است. ۲- با این دروغگویی‌ها در جنگ پیروز نشدند و حتما در مذاکره هم راه به جایی نخواهند برد. ۳- با ادامهٔ محاصره، تنگهٔ هرمز باز نخواهد ماند. - محمدباقر قالیباف | MB Ghalibaf tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 伊朗议会议长表示，只要美国封锁继续，霍尔木兹海峡就不会开放。1- 美国总统在一小时内提出了七项主张，这七项主张全是谎言。2- 他们没有通过这些谎言赢得战争，在谈判中也绝对不会有任何进展。3- 如果封锁继续，霍尔木兹海峡将不会保持开放。- 穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫 | MB Ghalibaf 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @LucasFoxNews : Iranian official: “only commercial vessels with authorization from the IRGC Navy are permitted to navigate through designated routes after paying the required tolls.” The time has come to comply with the new Maritime Regime of the Strait of Hormuz. These regulations are determined by Iran, not by social media posts! Under this new system, only commercial vessels with authorization from the IRGC Navy are permitted to navigate through designated routes after paying the required tolls. If the U.S. attempts to create any disturbance for Iranian ships, this situation can easily be changed. - ابراهیم عزیزی tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) RT @LucasFoxNews : 伊朗官员：“只有获得伊斯兰革命卫队海军授权的商船，在支付所需通行费后，才被允许通过指定航线航行。” 现在是遵守霍尔木兹海峡新海事制度的时候了。这些规定由伊朗决定，而不是由社交媒体帖子决定！根据这个新系统，只有获得伊斯兰革命卫队海军授权的商船，在支付所需通行费后，才被允许通过指定航线航行。如果美国试图对伊朗船只制造任何干扰，这种情况很容易改变。- 易卜拉欣·阿齐兹 推文

But actually, we never needed them. They needed us. They need us so badly. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet

I mean, it's about time we get some we've we've sort of the world has forgotten them, and they're good people." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇺🇸美国总统特朗普批评北约在与伊朗的冲突中缺乏支持。“既然霍尔木兹海峡的情况快结束了，我接到了北约的电话，问我们是否需要帮助。非常感谢，北约。我告诉……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 美国总统特朗普承诺让黎巴嫩再次伟大。“我们与伊朗的协议与黎巴嫩没有任何关系，但我们将让黎巴嫩再次伟大。我的意思是，是时候让我们……世界已经遗忘了他们，他们是好人。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. President Trump on the opening of the Strait of Hormuz: "This will be a great and brilliant day for the world because Iran has just announced that the Strait Of Hormuz is fully open and ready for business and full passage. But the naval blockade…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump criticized NATO's lack of support during the conflict with Iran. "And now that the Hormuz Strait situation is almost over, I received a call from NATO asking if we would like some help. Thank you very much, NATO. And I told them I would have liked your help two months ago, but now I really don't want your help anymore because they were absolutely useless when we needed them. But, actually, we never needed them. They needed us. They need us. They need us so badly." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国总统特朗普谈霍尔木兹海峡的开放：“这对世界来说将是伟大而辉煌的一天，因为伊朗刚刚宣布霍尔木兹海峡已完全开放，准备好进行商业活动和全面通行。但是海军封锁……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普批评北约在与伊朗的冲突中缺乏支持。“既然霍尔木兹海峡的情况快结束了，我接到了北约的电话，问我们是否需要帮助。我告诉他们，我两个月前会需要你们的帮助，但现在，我真的不再需要你们的帮助了，因为当我们需要他们时，他们完全没用。但实际上，我们从不需要他们。他们需要我们。他们需要我们。他们非常需要我们。” @wfwitness

text: Trump: I directed Pete Hegseth to begin releasing government files relating to UFOs and unexplained aerial phenomena. We found many interesting documents.
text_zh: 特朗普：我指示皮特·海格塞斯开始发布与UFO和不明空中现象有关的政府文件。我们发现了很多有趣的文件。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump on the opening of the Strait of Hormuz: "This will be a great and brilliant day for the world because Iran has just announced that the Strait Of Hormuz is fully open and ready for business and full passage. But the naval blockade with the greatest navy in the world, from the greatest military the world has ever seen, We built it during my first term. We built it. They said I was crazy. We weren't so crazy, were we? We'll remain in full force and effect as it pertains to Iran until such time as our transaction with Iran is 100% complete and fully signed." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普谈霍尔木兹海峡的开放：“这对世界来说将是伟大而辉煌的一天，因为伊朗刚刚宣布霍尔木兹海峡已完全开放，准备好进行商业活动和全面通行。但是海军封锁，由世界上最伟大的海军，由世界上见过的最伟大的军队执行，我们在我的第一个任期内建立了它。我们建立了它。他们说我疯了。我们没那么疯，对吧？在我们与伊朗的交易100%完成并完全签署之前，我们将保持全面有效，因为它涉及伊朗。” @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 ⚡️ A direct hit on the terrorist camp in Erbil, Iraqi Kurdistan.

text: The so-called ground invasion to the Litani river. The IDF fights civilians before it even fights combatants and its warfare's doctrine involves punishment more than it involves defeat of the enemy as a first goal Fighting the IDF is a costly task and worse under current conditions. Idk what the future holds...we will see I hope to see the day the Jews suffer for their crimes here.
text_zh: 所谓的对利塔尼河的地面入侵。以色列国防军在与战斗人员作战之前就先与平民作战，其战争学说涉及惩罚多于将击败敌人作为首要目标。与以色列国防军作战是一项代价高昂的任务，在当前条件下更糟。不知道未来会怎样……我们会看到的，我希望看到犹太人为他们在这里犯下的罪行受苦的那一天。

text: Ras al-Naqoura
text_zh: 拉斯纳古拉

text: Trump: Global warming is not working; we are actually cooling as a planet.
text_zh: 特朗普：全球变暖不起作用；我们作为一个星球实际上正在变冷。

text: School demolished in Marwahin And many many more
text_zh: 马尔瓦欣（Marwahin）的学校被拆毁，还有许许多多其他地方

text: Beit leaf
text_zh: 拜特利夫（Beit leaf）

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 CNN: A new round of negotiations between U.S. and Iranian negotiators is expected to take place in the Pakistani capital of Islamabad this Monday. Iranian officials also report that their negotiators will arrive in Islamabad on Sunday. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 CNN：预计美国和伊朗谈判代表将于本周一在巴基斯坦首都伊斯兰堡进行新一轮谈判。伊朗官员也报告称，他们的谈判代表将于周日抵达伊斯兰堡。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ﻿﻿﻿Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf: - The President of the United States made seven claims in one hour, all seven of which were false. ﻿﻿﻿- They did not win the war with these lies, and they will certainly not get anywhere in negotiations either. ﻿﻿﻿- With the continuation of the blockade, the Strait of Hormuz will not remain open. - Passage through the Strait of Hormuz will be conducted based on the "designated route" and with "Iranian authorization." - Whether the Strait is open or closed and the regulations governing it will be determined by the field, not by social media. - Media warfare and engineering public opinion are an important part of war, and the Iranian nation is not affected by these tricks. Read the real and accurate news of the negotiations in the recent interview of the Foreign Ministry spokesman.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫：- 美国总统在一小时内提出了七项主张，这七项全部是谎言。- 他们没有用这些谎言赢得战争，在谈判中也绝对不会有任何进展。- 如果封锁继续，霍尔木兹海峡将不会保持开放。- 通过霍尔木兹海峡的通行将基于“指定路线”并经“伊朗授权”进行。- 海峡是开放还是关闭以及管理它的规则将由实地情况决定，而不是由社交媒体决定。- 媒体战和操纵舆论是战争的重要组成部分，伊朗民族不会被这些伎俩所影响。请在外交部发言人最近的采访中阅读有关谈判的真实准确的新闻。

text: Trump: There is a genocide going on in South Africa... they kill people if they are white.
text_zh: 特朗普：南非正在发生种族灭绝……如果人们是白人，他们就会被杀害。

text: In Beit leaf and Bint Jbeil the IDF sent VIEDs (car bombs - M113) to demolish and attack neighborhoods
text_zh: 在拜特利夫（Beit leaf）和宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil），以色列国防军派遣了简易爆炸装置（汽车炸弹 - M113）来拆毁和攻击社区

text: 🇮🇷 Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf: In one hour, the US president made seven claims. All seven were lies. These lies won't win them the war, and they won't get them anywhere at the negotiating table either. If the siege continues, the Strait of Hormuz will not remain open. Transit through the Strait will be on designated routes and only with Iranian authorization. Whether the Strait stays open or closed, and the rules governing it, will be decided on the battlefield, not on social media. The information war and manipulation of public opinion are a major part of this conflict. The Iranian people will not be fooled by these tricks. For accurate details on the negotiations, refer to the Foreign Ministry spokesperson's latest interview. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫：美国总统在一小时内提出了七项主张。这七项全部是谎言。这些谎言无法为他们赢得战争，在谈判桌上也无法让他们取得任何进展。如果围困继续，霍尔木兹海峡将不会保持开放。通过海峡的通行将遵循指定路线，且仅在伊朗授权下进行。海峡是开放还是关闭，以及管理它的规则，将由战场决定，而不是由社交媒体决定。信息战和操纵舆论是这场冲突的重要组成部分。伊朗人民不会被这些伎俩所愚弄。有关谈判的准确详情，请参阅外交部发言人的最新采访。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to YINONEWS - ינון מגל: "סגן מפקד חטיבת הקומנדו סוגר מעגל אישי ולאומי בבינת ג'בל!! 🇮🇱" Geolocation: 33.126527°, 35.436557° Jews are celebrating the demolition of towns. Curse anyone who wants to distinguish between Zionism and Judaism. Had there been any different, we would have been action and voices against these crimes
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 YINONEWS - 伊农·马加尔（Yinon Magal）：“突击队副旅长在宾特朱拜勒完成了个人和国家的使命！！ 🇮🇱” 地理位置：33.126527°, 35.436557° 犹太人正在庆祝城镇的拆毁。诅咒任何试图区分犹太复国主义和犹太教的人。如果两者有任何不同，我们本会对这些罪行采取行动并发出声音

text: Trump: 70 years in waiting: it's called a new dawn for Cuba. We're going to help them out with Cuba. Now watch what happens.
text_zh: 特朗普：等待了70年：这被称为古巴的新黎明。我们将帮助他们解决古巴问题。现在看着会发生什么。

text: Trump: Remember, I'm the peacemaker.
text_zh: 特朗普：记住，我是和平缔造者。

text: Trump: Before I took office, people thought that America was in decline and the sun was setting on American power; no one thinks that anymore.
text_zh: 特朗普：在我上任之前，人们认为美国正在衰落，美国的力量正在日落西山；现在没有人再这样想了。

text: Is there so sane leader in this world that believes in judgement day and isn't blackmailed by the Jews? 📸 Ayta Shaeb, South Lebanon Picture showing the erasure of the ancient town of Ayta Shaeb by troops of Hashmoneam Brigade.
text_zh: 这个世界上还有理智的领导人相信审判日且没有被犹太人勒索吗？ 📸 黎巴嫩南部艾塔沙布（Ayta Shaeb） 图片显示哈斯莫尼安旅（Hashmoneam Brigade）的部队抹去了古镇艾塔沙布。

text: BREAKING: Iran’s Ghalibaf: The President of the United States made seven claims in one hour, all seven of which were false. They did not win the war with these lies, and they will certainly not get anywhere in negotiations either. With the continuation of the blockade, the Strait of Hormuz will not remain open. Passage through the Strait of Hormuz will be conducted based on the "designated route" and with "Iranian authorization." Whether the Strait is open or closed and the regulations governing it will be determined by the field, not by social media.
text_zh: 突发：伊朗卡利巴夫：美国总统在一小时内提出了七项主张，这七项全部是谎言。他们没有用这些谎言赢得战争，在谈判中也绝对不会有任何进展。如果封锁继续，霍尔木兹海峡将不会保持开放。通过霍尔木兹海峡的通行将基于“指定路线”并经“伊朗授权”进行。海峡是开放还是关闭以及管理它的规则将由实地情况决定，而不是由社交媒体决定。

text: During the so-called ceasefire tonight ❗️ Large scale Israeli demolitions of civilian houses in: - Naqoura - Bint Jbeil - Rchaf - Bayada - Chmaa And other towns
text_zh: 在今晚所谓的停火期间 ❗️ 以色列大规模拆毁了以下地区的民房：- 纳古拉（Naqoura）- 宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）- 拉沙夫（Rchaf）- 巴亚达（Bayada）- 查马（Chmaa）以及其他城镇

text: Trump: I ended 8 wars, and if we add Iran and Lebanon, that will be 10 wars ended.
text_zh: 特朗普：我结束了8场战争，如果我们加上伊朗和黎巴嫩，那就是结束了10场战争。

text: Faytuks News So nothing has changed today IRGC still controls the Strait and is limiting traffic. All who pass must pay a toll. Not much is changed except what’s in the President’s imagination. https://www.wsj.com/livecoverage/iran-war-us-talks-2026/card/iran-tells-mediators-re-opening-of-hormuz-is-still-limited-0LlvoCJ6vt6PMRuYrJfa https://twitter.com/michaeldweiss/status/2045252256295948360/photo/1 - Michael Weiss tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 所以今天什么都没有改变，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）仍然控制着海峡并限制通行。所有通过的人都必须支付通行费。除了总统想象中的内容外，没有太大变化。https://www.wsj.com/livecoverage/iran-war-us-talks-2026/card/iran-tells-mediators-re-opening-of-hormuz-is-still-limited-0LlvoCJ6vt6PMRuYrJfa https://twitter.com/michaeldweiss/status/2045252256295948360/photo/1 - Michael Weiss 推文

text: The Spectator Index US official says that the aircraft carrier USS Gerald Ford is now operating in the Red Sea, according to CNN report. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2045264270783557816/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 据CNN报道，美国官员称杰拉尔德·福特号航空母舰（USS Gerald Ford）目前正在红海行动。https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2045264270783557816/photo/1 推文

text: Trump: I want to thank the country of Pakistan and its great prime minister and its great, great field marshal; he is a great field marshal.
text_zh: 特朗普：我要感谢巴基斯坦这个国家，感谢它伟大的总理和伟大的陆军元帅；他是一位伟大的陆军元帅。

text: The Spectator Index Trump says that Iran's uranium will be brought to the United States of America tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 特朗普称伊朗的铀将被运往美利坚合众国 推文

text: Visioner ‼️ 🇨🇳 🇯🇵 BREAKING | China’s Ministry of Defense has openly warned Japan and called on it to immediately halt its steps toward militarization, stating that otherwise tensions in the region will escalate. “We urge the Japanese side to stop its retrogressive moves and make a clean break with militarism. Otherwise, it will lose the trust of its Asian neighbors and the international community. Japanese militarism once inflicted untold suffering on the region and beyond, yet a full reckoning has never taken place after World War II. Now, the Japanese side has completely stripped away its pretense and accelerated its pace of re-militarization, sparking deep concern and condemnation around the world,” a Chinese defense spokesperson said, in response to Japan’s increased defense budget and plans to allow the export of weapons. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner ‼️ 🇨🇳 🇯🇵 突发 | 中国国防部公开警告日本，呼吁其立即停止军事化步伐，并表示否则该地区的紧张局势将会升级。“我们敦促日方停止倒行逆施，与军国主义彻底切割。否则，它将失去亚洲邻国和国际社会的信任。日本军国主义曾给该地区及其他地区造成了难以言表的苦难，但二战后从未进行过彻底的清算。现在，日方已经完全撕下了伪装，加快了再军事化的步伐，引发了全世界的深切关注和谴责，”中国国防部发言人在回应日本增加国防预算和计划允许武器出口时表示。与我们一起查看最新动态：@visionergeo 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Trump: "I ended eight wars, and it may be a little early to say this, but if we add Iran and Lebanon that will be ten wars ended and many many millions of lives saved." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045263133044842556/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 此刻 - 特朗普：“我结束了八场战争，现在说这话可能还为时过早，但如果我们加上伊朗和黎巴嫩，那就是结束了十场战争，挽救了数百万人的生命。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045263133044842556/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Iran says it’s still effectively closed, only accessible with explicit permission and under strict conditions, which could include a toll. Trump: Iran has just announced that the Strait of Hormuz is fully open and ready for business https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2045261553797325193/video/1 - Acyn tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 伊朗称海峡实际上仍然关闭，只有在获得明确许可并满足严格条件（可能包括支付通行费）的情况下才能通行。特朗普：伊朗刚刚宣布霍尔木兹海峡已完全开放并准备好通航 https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2045261553797325193/video/1 - Acyn 推文
